title: YOKOCUT 130pc Mixed Drill Set, Titanium HSS Drill Bits for Metal, Wood, Concrete, Includes Brad Point, Depth Stop Collars & Hex Wrench Key
features: 🔥 For everyday DIY jobs, drill quickly and accurately with the right bit in mild steel, wood, plasterboard/drywall, plastics, brick and concrete. NB. Not suited for heat-treated or hardened steel

🔥 78 x HSS BITS: High-Speed Steel (HSS4241) round-shank twist drill bits, stronger than normal high-carbon steel, for soft metals eg. aluminium, mild steel, wood and plastics. Titanium coated for wear resistance and reduced friction. Sizes 1.5, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10mm

🔥 26 x BRAD POINT WOOD BITS: Their sharpened edges easily cut and churn out wood and plastics. Also known as spur point bits, piercing tips allows for non-slipping and accurate starts. Sizes 4, 5, 6, 8, 10mm

🔥 26 x MASONRY BITS: Super hard Tungsten-Carbide YG8C tips ensure longer-lasting strength against brick and concrete by breaking up stone and masonry particles in combined hammering and drilling action. Sizes 4, 5, 6, 8, 10mm

🔥 Take them anywhere in the slim storage tray case. Bits come wrapped in bags, not loose - separated into compartments with a clear plastic insert to prevent movement. Sizes are handily printed under the lid which is closed tightly by a steel-catch
description: Product Description KEY FEATURES YOKOCUT Drill bits set contains 130x different drill bits: 78 x JOBBER BITS: High-Speed Steel and round shank twist drill bits, designed for soft metals eg. aluminium, mild steel, wood and plastics. Titanium coated for wear resistance and reduced friction. 26 x BRAD POINT WOOD BITS: Sharpened edges easily cut out wood and plastics. Also known as spur point bits, piercing tips allows for good positioning and accurate starts. 26 x MASONRY BITS: Heavy duty Tungsten-Carbide YG8 tipped points ensure long lasting strength against brick and concrete as well as stone and masonry particles in combined hammering and drilling action. YOKOCUT 134-Piece drill bits include 3 stop collars: 6, 8, 10mm with a hex wrench key. This set of drillbits are for everyday DIY jobs, drill fast and accurately with the right bit in mild steel, wood, plasterboard/drywall, plastics, brick and concrete. This set is NOT for hard steel! Take the YOKOCUT 134-Piece drill bit set with stop collars anywhere in the slim storage case with a clear opening which you could easily see the drill bits inside. Bits are wrapped in bags, not loose - separated into compartments with a clear plastic insert to prevent movement. The sizes are printed under the lid which is closed tightly by a steel-catch. Apply to: metal, steel, cast iron, copper, aluminum, plastic and wood.
